1 为最高强度，0为禁用

nodes.title: SeedVR2
widgets_values:
SeedVr is not required. Enabled only when needed. The first load is expected to be very long since it will be downloading models. Choose 7b or 3b variant if you have oom issues.


SeedVr 不是必须的，仅在有需要时启用。首次加载时间会较长，因为需要下载模型文件。如果遇到内存不足（OOM）问题，请选择 7B 或 3B 版本。 国内小伙伴可以自行在网上下载。

nodes.title: Detailer Compare (with SD upscale) 跟SD放大原图对比
Dilate Mask 扩展涂抹区域
什么时候需要any detailer？
widgets_values: 当你需要局部重绘但是无法自动选中部位时，可手动涂抹重绘。

nodes.title: Any Detailer README
widgets_values: Whenever you want to inpaint a small area instead of the whole image.

nodes.title: Detailer README
widgets_values:
To address the issue many of you are facing—where using character LoRAs directly leads to poor results—here’s the approach I personally use in my workflow.
I generate the base image without loading any character LoRAs, and instead describe the character in detail within the positive prompts.
After the image is generated, I apply a face detailer workflow at the final stage to effectively “face-swap” using the character LoRA you want.
Make sure to adjust the prompts inside the detailer flow so they match the overall image; otherwise, you may end up with a generic default face from the LoRA.

nodes.title: 什么时候需要 Detailer？
widgets_values:
针对很多人在直接使用角色 LoRA 时容易出现效果不佳的问题，这里分享一下我个人在创作中的解决思路。
我会先在不加载任何角色 LoRA 的情况下生成基础图像，而是通过正向提示词对角色进行尽可能详细的描述。
在生成完成的最后阶段，我再加入一个面部细化（Face Detailer）流程，用来将你想使用的角色 LoRA 进行“换脸”。

需要注意的是，细化流程中的提示词一定要根据整体画面进行调整，否则很容易得到 LoRA 自带的默认脸型效果。

nodes.title: Denoise 值
widgets_values:
Chnage denoise up to 0.54, the higher denoise is the more likely it follows the prompt and your character LoRA.
可以吧denoise（降噪）最高提升到0.54来加强LoRA和提示词的影响力

nodes.title: Lora Usage / LoRa使用建议
widgets_values:
All Moody Models (ZIB/ZIT) recommends using ZIB Loras！
全线MOODY系列模型均推荐使用ZIB模型！

LoRas used on ZIB will have stronger effect on image structure whereas LoRas used on ZIT will be more toward the details.
在ZIB步骤使用的LoRa会影响构图和动作，在ZIT步骤的LoRa会影响更多细节。

当然，如果你想要超级相似的人物，你可以把ZIB的人物Lora同时放在第一和第二步里，
to achieve absolute likeliness, you can put your ZIB character lora in both ZIB and ZIT steps

Recommended Lora strength for ZIT LoRAs should not exceed 0.5, ZIB LoRAs should not exceed 1.2. 推荐ZIT LoRA强度不超过0.5，ZIB LoRAs 不超过1.2。

nodes.title: ← Generation Tips 生图小贴士:
widgets_values:
You can run Preview Image node on the left to preview see the image before SD upscale. Change up the seed until you find the best generation.

Change Prompt/Lora/Seed, preview, no defects? run full workflow. 

In 1st Generation you should be looking at the
 - composition
 - major defects/pose anormalies (small defects will likely be fixed in 2nd generation)

In 2nd Generation, you should be looking at the fine details
 - fingers/toes
 - facial expression
 - text
 - any other small details




你可以运行左边的 Preview Image 节点，在进行 SD 放大之前先预览图像。随机新种子来抽卡。

修改 Prompt / Lora，进行预览，如果没有明显缺陷，再运行完整工作流。

在第一轮生成中，你应该重点关注：
- 构图
- 主要缺陷 / 姿势异常（小缺陷通常可以在第二轮生成中修复）


在第二轮生成中，你应该重点关注细节：
- 手指 / 脚趾
- 面部表情
- 文字
- 其他任何细小的细节

←

nodes.title: 📐 Aspect Ratio + Scaled Resolution Table / 画面比例与放大分辨率表
widgets_values:
This table is used as a starting reference for image generation resolution settings. It helps you quickly choose safe, model-friendly starting dimensions without breaking compatibility or wasting VRAM. 这个表格用于作为 图像生成分辨率设置的起始参考。 它可以帮助你快速选择 安全、兼容模型的初始分辨率，避免报错或浪费显存。
---
| Aspect Ratio / 画面比例 | Notes (EN / CN) / 备注（英文 / 中文） | Base Resolution (W × H) / 基础分辨率 | Final Resolution (W × H) / 最终分辨率 (×1.7 × 2) | Final Total Pixels / 最终总像素 | | ------------------- | ----------------------------- | ------------------------------- | --------------------------------------- | -------------------------- | | 2:3 | Base portrait / 基础竖图 | 640 × 960 | 2176 × 3264 | 7,102,464 | | 3:4 | Stable portrait / 稳定竖图 | 672 × 896 | 2285 × 3046 | 6,960,110 | | 9:16 | Tall mobile / 手机竖屏长图 | 576 × 1024 | 1958 × 3482 | 6,817,756 | | 3:2 | Base landscape / 横图基准 | 960 × 640 | 3264 × 2176 | 7,102,464 | | 4:3 | Balanced landscape / 平衡横图 | 896 × 672 | 3046 × 2285 | 6,960,110 | | 16:9 | Widescreen / 宽屏视频 | 1024 × 576 | 3482 × 1958 | 6,817,756 | | 1:1 | Square format / 正方形 | 768 × 768 | 2611 × 2611 | 6,817,321 |

nodes.title: Why new prompt? 为什么需要单独提示词？
widgets_values:
Default: OFF (Enable only when necessary)


Imagine a prompt like: “a girl with a tattoo ‘MOODY’ right below her collarbone.”
When the image is generated all at once, the model understands the full body anatomy and correctly places the “MOODY” tattoo on the skin directly under the collarbone in the center of the chest.
However, when the image is split into smaller tiles/sections and each part is generated or upscaled independently, a tile that only sees part of the shoulder, upper arm, upper chest, or smooth skin area may still try to apply the “MOODY” tattoo. Because these areas are all relatively flat, smooth skin with gentle curves (similar to the collarbone area locally), the model easily confuses the location and randomly prints the “MOODY” text on the shoulder, arm, side of the chest, or back.


默认为关闭，需要时再启用。
想象一个提示词是“一个女孩在锁骨下方有‘MOODY’字样的纹身”。
如果整张图一次性生成，模型能够理解整体人体结构，把“MOODY”纹身正确地放在锁骨下方（脖子下方中央的皮肤区域），位置合理且清晰。
但如果把图像分成多个小块分别生成（例如 upscale 或 tiled 生成时），每一块只看到局部内容。比如某一块只包含肩膀、大臂上侧、胸口上方或其他平滑的皮肤区域，模型仍然会尝试在这些区域应用“MOODY”纹身。因为这些部位都是相对平坦、光滑、有一定弧度的皮肤，和锁骨区域在局部视觉特征上比较接近，模型很容易把纹身位置混淆，随机把“MOODY”几个字母印在手臂、肩膀、胸口或背部等不该出现的地方。

Known issue: 
最新Wild 蒸馏V4模型默认打开，please enable for newest wild v4 distilled model.

- **Description / 说明:**  
  Z-Image-Turbo-SDA is a highly efficient LoKr (Low-Rank Kronecker Product) adapter designed to rescue the **"Diversity Collapse"** problem in few-step distilled Flow Matching / Diffusion models.  
  用于解决少步数蒸馏 Flow Matching / Diffusion 模型中的“多样性崩塌”问题的高效 LoKr 适配器。

---

nodes.title: Enable Skin Contrast Boost? 加强皮肤画质？
About Seed (种子说明）
widgets_values:
It is slightly better to keep the same seed for 1st and 2nd gen + SD Upscale for consistent result, but change this if 1st gen is ok and 2nd gen needs some minor fixes.

为了获得一致的结果，最好第一代和第二代使用相同的种子，但如果第一次生图满意没问题而第二次需要一些小的改进，则可以更改这个值。平时重置为0最佳。

nodes.title: SDA USAGE (SDA 说明）
widgets_values:
Z-Image-Turbo-SDA is a highly efficient LoKr (Low-Rank Kronecker Product) adapter designed to rescue the "Diversity Collapse" problem in few-step distilled Flow Matching / Diffusion models. However, it also ## increases the chance of bad body anatomy ##. Lora compatibility drops greatly if enabled.


用于解决少步数蒸馏 Flow Matching / Diffusion 模型中的“多样性崩塌”问题的高效 LoKr 适配器。但是会一定程度造成姿势崩塌和多手多脚问题。若开启，Lora支持会大幅度降低。
